## Checklist
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] **I have read and agree to the [Contributor License Agreement](../CLA.md)** (the CLA bot will confirm on this PR)
- [ ] Lint, type-check, and tests pass locally
- [ ] New source files include the SPDX license header (`uv run python scripts/add_spdx_headers.py`)
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `.env` files, or real meeting data/fixtures
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or configuration changed
